person.name: Ermentrude Lisle
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
«b»Biography«/b»
Ermentrude de Lisle Birth: circa 1228 Braybrook, Northamptonshire, England Death: November 8, 1268 (40) Braybrook, Northamptonshire, England Immediate Family: Daughter of Robert L'Isle of Rampton & Nedging and Alice FitzGerold, Heiress of Kingston Lisle Wife of Walter de Ledet, of Corby Mother of Alicia Ledet, Heiress of Corby and Christian Ledet, Heiress of Baybrook Sister of Elizabeth Aldborough; Robert De Lisle; Gerard de Lisle and Sir De Lisle.

Which Wischard [Ledet] died in anno 1241, leaving Issue a Son called Walter. Which Walter had Issue, by Ermentrude his Wife, two Daughters, his Heirs; viz. Alice and Christian: whose Marriages the Abbot of Pipwell recovered by a Suit in Law, and sold them to Ermentrude their Mother. Which Ermentrude passed them again to John de Haya, with purpose that they might be Wives for his two Sons; and afterwards married her self to Robert de Peche. But, notwithstanding this Design of John de Haya, one of them, viz. Alice, became the Wife of Sir William Latimer; and Christian, of John de Latimer. 

An Inquisition for Henry de Braybroc was taken in Northamptonshire on an unknown date, which found that the two daughters of Walter Ledet, aged 12 and 11, were Henry's heirs, and Henry held Coreby manor in fee and inheritance and by the king's charter, which was the king's ancient demesne before he gave it to Henry and his heirs, who held it at fee farm for 10l. yearly. It was in the king's hands because Robert Peche, who was in the Isle of Ely with the disinherited, had the wardship of the manor through his wife, the widow of Walter Ledet with whom she had two daughters who are the heirs of Coreby manor.

zh.Rockingham Castle, Corby, Northamptonshi: 英國諾薩普頓史爾可比
zh.Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermentrude Lisle於1232年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可時，她的父親Robert de Lisle11229歲，母親Alice FitzGerold18歲。她於1249年與Walter DeLedet在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1268年11月8日在她的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.Rockingham Castle, Corby, Northamptonshi: 英国諾薩普頓史爾可比

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermentrude Lisle于1232年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布雷布盧可时，她的父亲Robert de Lisle11229岁，母亲Alice FitzGerold18岁。她于1249年与Walter DeLedet在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1268年11月8日在她的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Ermentrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, adopted from Old French by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It is derived from erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’ + traut ‘beloved’. It did not survive long into the Middle Ages, but was occasionally revived in the 18th and 19th centuries. It is now completely out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermentrude Lisle was born in 1232, in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Robert de Lisle, was 11229 and her mother, Alice FitzGerold, was 18. She married Walter DeLedet in 1249, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 8 November 1268, in her hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermentrude Lisle est née en 1232, à Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Lisle, avait 11229 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzGerold, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Walter DeLedet en 1249, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 novembre 1268, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermentrude Lisle 1232 in Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Lisle 11229 und ihre Mutter Alice FitzGerold 18. Sie hat 1249 in England, United Kingdom Walter DeLedet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. November 1268 im Alter von 36 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ermentrude Lisle è nata il nel 1232 nel Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Lisle, aveva 11229 anni e sua madre, Alice FitzGerold, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Walter DeLedet nel 1249, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 8 novembre 1268, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermentrude Lisleが1232年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブレイブルークで生まれた時，父Robert de Lisleは11229歳，母Alice FitzGeroldは18歳であった。1249年にイギリスイギリスでWalter DeLedetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1268年11月8日に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ermentrude Lisle(이)가 1232년 영국 노르섬프토실르 브라이브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Lisle(은)는 11229세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzGerold(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1249년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Walter DeLedet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1268년 11월 8일 그녀의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermentrude Lisle nasceu em 1232, em Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Lisle, tinha 11229 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzGerold, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter DeLedet em 1249, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1268, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermentrude Lisle родилась в 1232 г. в местности брэибрук, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Lisle было 11229 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzGerold, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter DeLedet в 1249 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 ноября 1268 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ermentrude Lisle nació en 1232, en Braybrooke, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Lisle, tenía 11229 años y su mamá, Alice FitzGerold, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Walter DeLedet en 1249, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1268, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
